## What

<!-- One or two sentence summary of the change. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem this solves. Link to the Linear ticket, Notion page, or issue if applicable. -->

## How tested

<!-- Tick each that applies and add details for non-obvious cases. -->

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Verified on staging
- [ ] Unit or integration tests added or updated
- [ ] No regressions in related flows
- [ ] Screenshots or recordings attached (for UI changes)

## Notes for reviewer

<!--
Anything the reviewer should know:
- tricky decisions or trade-offs
- follow-up work deferred to a later PR
- specific files or sections to focus on
- known limitations
-->

## Checklist before requesting review

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Branch name follows the `type/description` format
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Documentation updated if public behaviour changed
- [ ] Lockfile updated if dependencies changed
- [ ] No `console.log`, `print`, or debug code left behind
